zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Neville於大約1042年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利內維爾時，他的父親Richard de Neville19歲，母親Isabella de Neville34歲。他於大約1080年與Philicia de Damoys在英國英格蘭藍卡爾宏比 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1118年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾瓦爾可特享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .
Catalan: variant of   Novell  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Neville was born about 1042, in Néville, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Richard de Neville, was 19 and his mother, Isabella de Neville, was 34. He married Philicia de Damoys about 1080, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1118, in Walcot, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Staindrop, Durham, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Neville est né environ 1042, à Néville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Richard de Neville, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Neville, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Philicia de Damoys environ 1080, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1118, à Walcot, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Neville um 1042 in Néville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Neville 19 und seine Mutter Isabella de Neville 34. Er hat um 1080 in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Philicia de Damoys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1118 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Walcot, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Staindrop, Durham, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Philicia de Damoys circa 1080, nel Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Nevilleが約1042年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメンeヴィルで生まれた時，父Richard de Nevilleは19歳，母Isabella de Nevilleは34歳であった。約1080年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルでPhilicia de Damoysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1118年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアワルコトで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスダルハムスティインドロップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Neville(이)가 대략 1042년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 e빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Neville(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Neville(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1080년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 Philicia de Damoys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1118년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 월컷에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 스테인드럽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1042, em Néville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard de Neville, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Neville, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Philicia de Damoys aproximadamente 1080, em Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1118, em Walcot, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Neville родился около 1042 г. в местности нeвилл, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard de Neville было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Neville, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Philicia de Damoys около 1080 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1118 г. в местности валкот, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Philicia de Damoys aproximadamente 1080, en Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
